title: Green Thumb Industries Inc. (GTBIF) Stock Price, News, Quote & History
text: Green Thumb Industries Inc (OTCQX: GTBIF) is a leading national cannabis consumer packaged goods company and retailer. The company is headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, and operates in 14 states with over 100 retail locations under the RISE brand. The company's business model includes cannabis cultivation, advanced manufacturing of branded products, and direct-to-consumer retail. Green Thumb reported strong full-year 2024 results with $1.1 billion in revenue, up 7.8% year-over-year. The company generated $73.1 million in net income and $371.3 million in adjusted EBITDA. Green Thumb maintains a strong balance sheet with $172 million in cash and total debt of $255 million as of year-end 2024. The company's cash position provides financial flexibility for capital allocation. All eight analysts surveyed by S&P Global in April who cover Green Thumb rated the stock a buy, with the consensus 12-month price target reflecting potential upside of more than 130%. The company consistently generates positive earnings and EBITDA, with strong gross margins and a solid balance sheet position.
